mapper.insert: insert into users(id, username, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, consent_health_analysis, consent_finance_analysis, persona_json) values(#{id}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{consentHealthAnalysis}, #{consentFinanceAnalysis}, #{personaJson})
mapper.update: update users set nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl} where id = #{id}
update users set consent_health_analysis = #{consentHealthAnalysis}, consent_finance_analysis = #{consentFinanceAnalysis} where id = #{id}
update users set persona_json = #{personaJson} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select device_id from user_device where user_id = #{userId}
